learning_log.text: I am focusing on shaping a clear operator offer that solves a specific pain point for service providers, rather than talking about generic AI agent capabilities. Today I drafted a concise description of the problem we address and began outlining the core benefits for operators.

ideas.text: Today I refined the operator offer by identifying the core pain point for service providers and listing three concrete benefits they would see. I also sketched a simple one-page outline that we can test with a few potential operators next week.
